snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe ūüĎČ https://bit.ly/Saregama_Malayalam

Presenting the first single "IYKYK" from 'Athiradi' starring Tovino Thomas, Basil Joseph, Zarin Shihab, Riya Shibu and others. Directed by Arun Anirudhan. Music Composed by Vishnu Vijay

Song Credits: 
Song: IYKYK
Singer: Fejo, Poornima Kannan
Lyrics: Suhail Koya
Music Composed, Arranged, Produced by Vishnu Vijay @ DRAVIDA STUDIOS, CHENNAI
Vocals Recorded @ DRAVIDA STUDIOS, CHENNAI

Video Credits:

Co-producers: Sameer Thahir, Tovino Thomas
Written By: Paulson Skaria, Arun Anirudhan

Editor: Chaman Chakko

Digital Content: Dripwave Collective

Lyrics: 
Mizhi chaanthozhiche kuzhache
And she chirikondu nanache
Urache manasselurachoru 
Ghanayadi Anuraagam

Nejamaava? Cinemaava?
She is a sigmava ? Enigmava? 

If you know you know (IYKYK) chorus

Thedi nadannoru theneecha
Ini Sem aake neeya pareeksha
Aramani neram neeyum ente koode vanniri
Sundari Pimpiriye
So many aasha keri jet mele set 
Ini tell me prathividhi nin chiri chevikalil
Paattukalaaye.. 
Aa cute-ukalaaye.. 
My doodle-ye.. Njan Totallye.. Unusuallye.. 
Falling for you again again.

Lyrics: 
Mizhi chaanthozhiche kuzhache
And she chirikondu nanache
Urache manasselurachoru 
Ghanayadi Anuraagam

Nejamaava? Cinemaava?
She is a sigmava ? Enigmava? 

If you know you know (IYKYK) chorus

Thedi nadannoru theneecha
Ini Sem aake neeya pareeksha
Aramani neram neeyum ente koode vanniri
Sundari Pimpiriye
So many aasha keri jet mele set 
Ini tell me prathividhi nin chiri chevikalil
Paattukalaaye.. 
Aa cute-ukalaaye.. 
My doodle-ye.. Njan Totallye.. Unusuallye.. 
Falling for you again again.

snippet.title: Siftaan : Amrit Maan | Tania | Neeru Bajwa | Jasmeen Akhtar | Jawaak | New Punjabi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Speed Records brings you ‚ÄėSiftaan‚Äô, a vibrant new Punjabi song by Amrit Maan and Jasmeen Akhtar, straight from the much-awaited Punjabi movie Jawaak. Packed with energetic beats, catchy lyrics, and a festive vibe, this track is tailor-made for wedding celebrations, sangeet nights, and full-on party scenes.

If you‚Äôre looking for the latest Punjabi wedding song that instantly lifts the mood, Siftaan hits the mark. Amrit Maan‚Äôs signature style blends perfectly with Jasmeen Akhtar‚Äôs powerful vocals, creating a track that feels both fresh and rooted in Punjabi music.

From Punjabi dance songs for weddings to trending Punjabi party songs, Siftaan fits effortlessly into every high-energy playlist. Whether you‚Äôre making Instagram reels, or just want a song to vibe to with friends, this one has replay value written all over it. Check out the song now!!!

#Siftaan #AmritMaan #NewPunjabiSong #PunjabiMovieSong #JawaakSong #PunjabiMusic

snippet.title: Kya Mausum Aaya Hai | Anari Movie Song | Udit Narayan, Sadhana Sargam | Hindi Gana
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song Name : Kya Mausam Aaya Hai
Singer : Sadhana Sargam, Udit Narayan
Music Director: Anand Shrivastav, Milind Shrivastav
Lyrics by: Sameer

Movie Cast & Crew:
Director:  K. Muralimohana Rao
Star Cast: Karishma Kapoor, Venkatesh, Suresh Oberoi

Lyrics : 
Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Purab se mastani purvai chali
Khushoo se mehki
Phoolon ki gali

Geet gaye nadiyan
Lehron mein hai sargam
Hai ghata deewani
Boondon mein hai cham cham

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Purab se mastani purvai chali
Khushoo se mehki
Phoolon ki gali

Geet gaye nadiyan
Lehron mein hai sargam
Hai ghata deewani
Boondon mein hai cham cham

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Mehalon ki rani
Dukh se begani
Lag jaye na dhoop tujhe
Ud ud jau
Sabko bataon
Dhoop lage hai chao mein mujhe

Mehalon ki rani
Dukh se begani
Lag jaye na dhoop tujhe
Ud ud jau
Sabko bataon
Dhoop lage hai chao mein mujhe

Kaaton se ho jaye paon na ghayal
Kaaton pe naachungi bandh ke mein payal
Ghar nahi yeh to
Kutiya humari hai

Yeh teri kutiya to mehalo se pyaari hai

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Purab se mastani purvai chali
Khushoo se mehki
Phoolon ki gali

Geet gaye nadiyan
Lehron mein hai sargam
Hai ghata deewani
Boondon mein hai cham cham

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Behti pawan ki
Ujaale gagan ki
Jee karta hai saath chalu

Cheekne dagar hai
Geer ne ka daar hai
Tham ka tera haath chalu

Behti pawan ki
Ujaale gagan ki
Jee karta hai saath chalu

Cheekne dagar hai
Geer ne ka daar hai
Tham ka tera haath chalu

Dharti pe bekhren hai
Oos ke moti

Yeh teri boli to
Sur naye peeroti

Dard ka woh agan

Mein chod ke aaye
Kya tujhe jaannat ki raunka nahi bhai

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Purab se mastani purvai chali
Khushoo se mehki
Phoolon ki gali

Geet gaye nadiyan
Lehron mein hai sargam
Hai ghata deewani
Boondon mein hai cham cham

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai.

#karishmakapoor #venkatesh  #uditnarayan #sadhnasargam #KyaMausamAayaHai #bollywoodsongs #hindisong #romanticsongs

localized.title: Aksar Is Duniya Mein - HD | Akshay Kumar, Sunil Shetty, Mahima Chaudhary | Dhadkan Song, Alka Yagnik
localized.description:
Aksar Is Duniya Mein - HD | Akshay Kumar, Sunil Shetty, Mahima Chaudhary | Dhadkan Song, Alka Yagnik

Song Credit:-

Title: Aksar Is Duniya Mein
Movie/album: Dhadkan
Singers: Alka Yagnik
Song Lyricists: Sameer
Composer: Nadeem Saifi, Shravan Rathod
Music Director: Nadeem Saifi, Shravan Rathod
Starring: Akshay Kumar, Shilpa Shetty, Sunil Shetty, Mahima Chaudhry
Release on: 11th August, 2000

Song Lyrics:-

Hey hey eh hey hey eh hey eh hey.......
Hey hey eh hey hey aa ha aa ha.........
Aa haa ha ha haaaa

Aksar is duniya mein anjane milte hain
Aksar is duniya mein anjane milte hain
Anjani raahon mein milke kho jaate hain
Lekin hamesha woh yaad aate hain
Aksar is duniya mein anjaane milte hain
Anjaani raahon mein milke kho jaate hain
Lekin hamesha woh yaad aate hain
Aksar iss duniya mein...

Aankhon se baat hoti hai,
dhadkan bhi saath hoti hai
Koyi naa samjhe yeh ishk kee zubaan
Aankhon se baat hoti hai,
dhadkan bhei saath hoti hai
Koyi naa samjhe yeh ishk kee zubaan
Du ru ru ru ru ru.........
Dheeray dheeray se woh
dil mein bas jaate hain
Dheeray dheeray se woh
dil mein bas jaate hain
Choree choree se woh dil ko churate hain
Phir ek din woh bichhad jaate hain
Aksar iss duniya me.........

Yeh dil toh pyaar maange hai,
saccha dildar maange hai
Jaanay mohabbat mile kisse kahan
Yeh dil toh pyaar maange hai,
saccha dildar maange hai
Jaanay mohabbat mile kisse kahan
Du ru ru ru ru ru.........
Jab aisi raaton mein deewane milte hain
Jab aisi raaton mein deewane milte hain
Nazrein takraati hain
phir dil dhadakte hain
Chahat ke afsaane ban jaate hain

Aksar iss duniya mein
Anjane milte hain
Anjanee raho me milke kho jate hain
Lekin hamesha woh yaad aate hain
Lekin hamesha woh yaad aate hain

Haan aksar iss duniya mein
Aah aah aah aah aah
Aah aah aah aah aah
Aah aah aah aah aah

#NessFitGamer #gta 5 #gta5hindi 

Franklin Saving Shinchan From Granny In Indian Bike Driving 3D ! ūüėĪ

This video is about the Indian Bike Driving 3D game, this is a horror scary story about Granny in Indian Bike Driving 3D. In this animated scary story, Franklin of Indian bike driving 3d went to granny house because his brother Shinchan was Kidnapped By Granny Ghost. Now what will happen next in this scary story you will see more in the video. 

Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/nessfitgamer01?igsh=MTBudmpzZGdnZXljNg==

I hope you guys enjoyed this video if you did please consider to like the video and subscribe the channel. ‚Ě§ÔłŹ

Disclaimer:
This video is made using GTA 5, with Indian Bike Driving 3D assets added inside the game.

snippet.title: Hentok Konyak - Nyu Wan Wao (Official Music Video) @Aphewangsa
snippet.description:
My First Original Song ‚ÄĒ A Tribute to My Mother

This debut original composition is a deeply personal tribute to my mother, whose passing when I was six years old profoundly influenced the course of my life. This piece reflects a journey of love, loss, and resilience, carried forward by her enduring memory.


Written & Composed by: Hentok Konyakhttps://www.instagram.com/hentok_konyak?igsh=ZmNkZ2lrZGozOXY2


Cast:

‚ÄĘAphe Konyakhttps://www.instagram.com/aphe_cooks_and_vlogs2712?igsh=ams4aXZ5Z2x3M3dh
‚ÄĘRathai
‚ÄĘAmenla Pongenhttps://www.instagram.com/amen90105?igsh=cmV0bHdjeTE1bW4w


Video Credits:

‚ÄĘCinematography by Studio LAGOMhttps://www.instagram.com/studiolagom__?igsh=dGV4Y2VnM3o3anZ4
‚ÄĘDirected by Akum Denhttps://www.instagram.com/aakumden?igsh=c3p0ODY0ejVjMTlh
‚ÄĘViky Meiteihttps://www.instagram.com/vm_videosolution?igsh=MWN6cHJvNW5qdnljdA==
‚ÄĘManminder Singhhttps://www.instagram.com/manni0.9?igsh=cWV4bTVueno3Z2tl


Script Written by: Chongboi Singsonhttps://www.instagram.com/writes_cb?igsh=aTRwOWQ1eTBqanlw



Lyrics Translated by: Leiwang Thttps://www.instagram.com/_alei_yanlem?igsh=dWZzOXZtczRzY3Fk


Special Thanks:

We extend our sincere gratitude to Mr. & Mrs. Tongnyei Konyak for permitting us to feature their children.


Special thanks to Miss Amenla Pongen & Mrs. Pheying Konyak for coordinating the children for the video cast.


We are also grateful to Mr. & Mrs. Tashi Ozukum for generously providing their home, along with their warm hospitality and invaluable support throughout the production.





LYRICS 

Verse 1
Kahtok nyu me √ľya tuh sh√ľo 
Hongli mongmei pu y√ľnang pe
Nyem ha me muh khah ha min pha
Puhpu humnung nyu li phei me

Chorus 
Onyu nang e puhpu nang ha t√ľo 
Nang ngoh pu nyoi te yah tei yah
Nyu wan wao e √ľ-√ľyin m√ľkphe shaha
Phei nyih nyu a lin k√ļm

Verse 2
Shin mang me nge pu te nohoi
Mangmeng √ľja she ie nang ki
Onyu t√ľme ame h√ľo hah
H√ľo lak nyoi √ľte ie t√ľm pha


Verse 3
Puhpu humnung nyu y√ľnang ma
Noksha phongjong wing e mah nang
Yoi nyu mongmeng ne tah t√ļm hah 
Li phei me yung pu jajang ja

Verse 4
Shaji onyu nang ha t√ľo a
Nang monghum lak ju ngoi t√ľki
Nang ha √ľkem pa yung shon pu
Ngao wing jai ya ken pu onyu..

#mothersday #song #tribute #emotional #song #truestory #hentok #konyak
